creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Hello Palle,

Digging a little bit deeper on this issue, I've found that it is similar to the issue described in 
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=250049

It was fixed in lang/luajit-openresty port, so I guess that we can use the same or similar patch for the sysutils/fluent-bit as well.
